recipe.title: Basic tomato sauce
recipe.description: This easy tomato sauce recipe from Jamie Oliver is so versatile. Perfect for stirring through pasta, as a homemade pizza topping, or use to make a lasagne!

ingredients.name: × 400g tins of quality Italian plum tomatoes

steps.descr: Peel and finely chop the garlic, then gently fry in a...
steps.instructions: Peel and finely chop the garlic, then gently fry in a thick-bottomed pan with 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Crumble in the chilli, add the oregano and tomatoes.

on_enter.say: Peel and finely chop the garlic, then gently fry in a thick-bottomed pan with 2 tablespoons of olive oil. Crumble in the chilli, add the oregano and tomatoes.

steps.descr: Mix gently, but do not break up the tomatoes as this...
steps.instructions: Mix gently, but do not break up the tomatoes as this will release the pips, which will make the sauce slightly bitter – by leaving the tomatoes whole and letting the mixture cook slowly you’ll get a nice sweet sauce. (You can remove the pips from the tomatoes if you want, but I don’t bother.) Bring to the boil and simmer gently for 1 hour.

on_enter.say: Mix gently, but do not break up the tomatoes as this will release the pips, which will make the sauce slightly bitter – by leaving the tomatoes whole and letting the mixture cook slowly you’ll get a nice sweet sauce. (You can remove the pips from the tomatoes if you want, but I don’t bother.) Bring to the boil and simmer gently for 1 hour.

steps.descr: Add the vinegar to the pan, then stir and chop up the...
steps.instructions: Add the vinegar to the pan, then stir and chop up the tomatoes in the sauce.

on_enter.say: Add the vinegar to the pan, then stir and chop up the tomatoes in the sauce.

steps.descr: Pick the basil or marjoram and roughly chop, then add to...
steps.instructions: Pick the basil or marjoram and roughly chop, then add to the pan.

on_enter.say: Pick the basil or marjoram and roughly chop, then add to the pan.

steps.descr: Season well to taste with sea salt and black pepper, and...
steps.instructions: Season well to taste with sea salt and black pepper, and finish with 2-3 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil.

on_enter.say: Season well to taste with sea salt and black pepper, and finish with 2-3 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil.
